stonetop.summary: A Green Lord who damned itself — sealed below, twisted with hatred, spawning new horrors.

system.concept: A Green Lord who damned itself — sealed below, twisted with hatred, spawning new horrors.
system.description: @UUID[Compendium.stonetop_pwd.stonetop-journal.JournalEntry.VosjScKksp5B3hsc]{The Green Lords} damned themselves. Driven from their homes and hunted by their own creations, betrayed by their fellow @UUID[Compendium.stonetop_pwd.stonetop-journal.JournalEntry.eoTIBDMIzJXByPCZ]{Makers}, they called up the darkness and the poison of the @UUID[Compendium.stonetop_pwd.stonetop-journal.JournalEntry.5Kym1qDHTmM8XUQ6]{Things Below} and let it flow through their minds, their flesh, their lands. Corralled into one last trap, they went below — into the bosom of their masters — twisted and mad with hatred. There they wait, and spawn new horrors, and hate. No @UUID[Compendium.stonetop_pwd.stonetop-journal.JournalEntry.lB57gclVP4TiOIRb]{Fomoraij} is truly typical: a constraint dictates its instinct, and its tags, stats, qualities, and moves are shaped by its themes, its lair, and the forms it has taken.
